layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100, and it's getting worse. Bitcoin is holding around $64K but altcoins are bleeding. Most coins on the watchlist show bearish chart patterns with sellers firmly in control. While fear can create buying opportunities, right now the charts aren't showing clear reversal signals — it's like trying to catch a falling knife. The best move is to wait for the selling to exhaust itself before committing capital.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Watch for ETH to test $1,800 support — if it holds and bounces with strong volume, that could be the entry signal. Don't rush in while fear is still intensifying.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a high-conviction entry right now. BONK has RSI near oversold but its chart bias is -2.0 (strongly bearish) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu patterns — this is a falling knife, not a bounce setup. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +18% in 7 days means it's already extended — buying here risks a pullback. ETH at RSI 39 is the most interesting, but its chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs. The prudent play is to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support and show a reversal candle before entering. BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to pressure alts, and Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening suggests more downside may come before a true reversal.
risk_factors: Fear & Greed index still worsening (25 and declining) — capitulation selling could accelerate
BTC dominance at 56.5% means capital is flowing away from altcoins into Bitcoin
No clear bullish reversal candles or MACD crosses confirmed on any candidate
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirms the entry thesis
Fear & Greed index stabilization or uptick — reversal from 25 would signal sentiment bottom
BTC dominance trend — any decline below 56% would favor altcoin rotation
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) and worsening, with BTC holding $64K while alts bleed. High BTC dominance at 56.5% signals a risk-off environment where altcoin swing trades carry elevated risk.
context_banner: Extreme Fear is deepening across crypto — disciplined traders wait for reversal confirmation before deploying capital.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 25 (Extreme Fear) and worsening from 27 yesterday — no signs of sentiment bottom yet, suggesting more downside risk before a tradeable bounce.
ETH RSI at 39 is the most attractive reading among candidates and approaching the oversold zone where our historical 80% win rate kicks in, but hasn't crossed the 30 threshold for a strong signal.
Every candidate except LDO shows neutral-to-bearish chart bias. LDO's +0.85 bullish bias (Three White Soldiers) is offset by already being extended +18% in 7 days.
'ETH derivatives reset' article suggests positioning is being cleared out — this could set the stage for a cleaner move once fear subsides.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in fifth payment round could create short-term sell pressure as recipients liquidate received tokens.
